title: Lemone Craft
description: Welcome to Lemone Craft, a Vanilla++ Experience originally created for a dead discord server. Now reformatted as a public modpack! (does have server mods meant for a server! but can be played solo!)
body:
Welcome to Lemone Craft, A modpack _originally!_ meant for my custom modded MC server for Project Violet (no longer alive...), which has now been shutdown due to inactivity in late september of 2023! I have decided to redesign the name and logo to give this modpack new life!

This Server Modpack is built from [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and had a ton of added QOL mods and small game changing mods with built in Proxy Chat and Essential! This makes sure everyone has a smooth experience when playing but still gets the Modded Vanilla++ Experience

This modpack is meant for a server but would be fun to download and play with friends using Essential to host private worlds and invite people you play with!
